message:
feat(vef): expand Verifiable Execution Framework with proof service, generator, verifier, and SDK integration

New VEF Modules (7 new files):
- proof_service.rs: Centralized proof generation and verification service with
  priority scheduling and batch processing
- proof_generator.rs: Deterministic proof generation from execution traces with
  attestation binding and evidence capsule integration
- proof_verifier.rs: Multi-layer proof verification pipeline with configurable
  trust policies and failure classification
- evidence_capsule.rs: Tamper-evident evidence packaging with cryptographic
  sealing and chain-of-custody tracking
- verification_state.rs: State machine for verification lifecycle management
  with deterministic transitions and event emission
- control_integration.rs: VEF integration with node control plane for policy-driven
  proof scheduling and attestation coordination
- sdk_integration.rs: VEF SDK bridge for external verifier integration with
  capability-gated access and rate limiting

Updated VEF Modules:
- proof_scheduler.rs: Enhanced scheduling with service matrix awareness
- receipt_chain.rs: Refined chain integrity with gap detection improvements
- mod.rs: Updated exports for all new submodules

Tests:
- vef_proof_service.rs: Proof service conformance tests
- vef_proof_service_support.rs: Support test utilities

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
